name: Decision change

title: "Decision change: "

---

## Decision

Example: `RAG-001`

## Current Default

What does Baseplate currently recommend?

## Proposed Change

What should change?

## Evidence

List sources and why they are stronger than the current basis.

## Caveats

What uncertainty remains?

## Builder Impact

What should builders do differently if this change is accepted?
